  • Converters
    • toDotNodeId
    • toDotNodeId
    • toDotNodeId

Generic implementation of graph data structure

Imports

htemplates, halgorithm, graphviz_ast, hdebug_misc, base_errors

Types

NoProperty = distinct char
HNodeId = distinct int
HEdgeId = distinct int
HNodeSet = object
  intSet: IntSet

HEdgeSet = object
  intSet: IntSet

HNode = object
  id: HNodeId

HEdge = object
  id: HEdgeId

HGraphProperty = enum
  gpDirected, gpUndirected, gpAllowSelfLoops, gpIgnoreSelfLoops
HGraphStructure = ref object
  properties: set[HGraphProperty]
  maxId: int
  edgeMap: Table[HEdgeId, (HNode, HNode)]
  ingoingIndex: Table[HNodeId, HEdgeSet]
  outgoingIndex: Table[HNodeId, HEdgeSet]
  nodeSet: HNodeSet

HNodeMap[N] = ref object
  valueMap: Table[HNode, N]
  case keepReverseIndex: bool
  of true:
      reverseMap: Table[N, seq[HNode]]

  of false:
      nil

  
HEdgeMap[E] = ref object
  valueMap: Table[HEdge, E]
  case keepReverseIndex: bool
  of true:
      reverseMap: Table[E, seq[HEdge]]

  of false:
      nil

  
HGraph[N; E] = object
  structure*: HGraphStructure
  edgeMap*: HEdgeMap[E]
  nodeMap*: HNodeMap[N]

HGraphPath = seq[HNode]
HNodeStack = object
  stack: seq[HNode]
  inStack: HNodeSet

HGraphError = ref object of CatchableError
HGraphCyclesError = ref object of HGraphError

Procs

proc addNode[N, E](graph: var HGraph[N, E]; value: N): HNode {...}{.discardable.}
Add new node with value to graph and return resulting node 
proc addNode[N, E](graph: var HGraph[N, E]; node: HNode; value: N): HNode {...}{.
    discardable.}
proc addOrGetNode[N, E](graph: var HGraph[N, E]; value: N): HNode {...}{.discardable.}
Add new node with given value to graph or return first matching node for that value 
proc addEdge[N, E](graph: var HGraph[N, E]; source, target: HNode; value: E): HEdge {...}{.
    discardable.}
Add new edge with @arg{value} between @arg{source} and @arg{target} nodes, return resulting edge 
proc addEdge[N](graph: var HGraph[N, NoProperty]; source, target: HNode): HEdge {...}{.
    discardable.}
proc addEdge[N, E](graph: var HGraph[N, E]; sourceValue, targetValue: N;
                   edgeValue: E): HEdge {...}{.discardable.}
proc addEdge[N, NoProperty](graph: var HGraph[N, NoProperty];
                            sourceValue, targetValue: N): HEdge {...}{.discardable.}
proc addOrGetEdge[N, E](graph: var HGraph[N, E]; sourceValue, targetValue: N;
                        edgeValue: E): HEdge {...}{.discardable.}
proc addOrGetEdge[N, NoProperty](graph: var HGraph[N, NoProperty];
                                 source, target: HNode): HEdge {...}{.discardable.}
proc addOrGetEdge[N, E](graph: var HGraph[N, E]; source, target: HNode; edge: E): HEdge {...}{.
    discardable.}
proc addOrGetEdge[N, E](graph: var HGraph[N, E]; sourceValue, targetValue: N): HEdge {...}{.
    discardable.}
proc addOrGetEdge[N, E](graph: var HGraph[N, E]; edgePairs: openArray[
    tuple[edgePair: tuple[sourceValue, targetValue: N], edgeValue: E]]): seq[
    HEdge] {...}{.discardable.}
proc removeNode[N, E](graph: var HGraph[N, E]; node: HNode)

Remove node from graph.

Note that related edges will be removed too, if they completely loose all related nodes. So calling removeHNode("a -> b", "b") will not only remove node "b", but also an edge.

proc removeEdge[N, E](graph: var HGraph[N, E]; edge: HEdge)
Remove edge from graph. Note that starting/ending nodes will not be removed. 
proc newHGraphForRef[T: ref](t: T): HGraph[T, NoProperty]
proc getNode[N, E](graph: HGraph[N, E]; value: N): HNode
Return node associated with given value 
proc getNodeId(node: HNode): HNodeId {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc getNodeById[N, E](graph: HGraph[N, E]; id: int): HNode
proc isAdjacent[N, E](graph: HGraph[N, E]; node1, node2: HNode): bool
Tests whether there is an edge from the vertex x to the vertex y; 
proc topologicalOrdering[N, E](graph: HGraph[N, E]): seq[HNode]
Return graph nodes in topological ordering if possible. Otherwise (if graph contains cycles raise HGraphCyclesError) 
proc dependencyOrdering[N, E](graph: HGraph[N, E]; root: HNode;
                              leafFirst: bool = true): seq[HNode]
Return graph nodes in dependencies for node. IMPLEMENT 
proc colorizeDSatur[N, E](graph: HGraph[N, E]): tuple[maxColors: int,
    colorMap: HNodeMap[int]]
Color graph nodes using DSatur algorithm 
proc colorizeRLF[N, E](graph: HGraph[N, E])
Color graph using RLF algorithm. IMPLEMENT 
proc minimalSpanningTree[N, E](graph: HGraph[N, E]): HGraph[N, E]
Return minimal spanning tree for graph. IMPLEMENT 
proc findCycles[N, E](graph: HGraph[N, E]; ignoreSelf: bool = false;
                      overrideDirected: bool = false): seq[HGraphPath]
proc mergeCycleSets(cycles: seq[HGraphPath]): seq[HNodeSet] {...}{.raises: [],
    tags: [].}
proc connectedComponents[N, E](graph: HGraph[N, E];
                               overrideDirected: bool = false): seq[HNodeSet]
Return nodes forming strongly connected components 
proc extendOutgoing[N, E, V](graph: HGraph[N, E]; nodes: HNodeSet;
    existingGroups: var Table[HNodeSet, V] | var TableRef[HNodeSet, V];
                             accept: proc (node: HNode): bool = nil): HNodeSet
proc extendOutgoing[N, E, V](graph: HGraph[N, E]; nodes: HNodeSet;
                             existingGroups: var seq[(HNodeSet, V)];
                             accept: proc (node: HNode): bool = nil): HNodeSet
proc orthoLayout[N, E](graph: HGraph[N, E]): OrthoLayoutData
WIP implementation of orthogonal graph layout algorithm described in https://arxiv.org/abs/1807.09368 
proc drawOrthoLayout(layoutData: OrthoLayoutData): seq[seq[string]] {...}{.
    raises: [], tags: [].}
proc dotRepr[N, E](graph: HGraph[N, E];
                   nodeDotRepr: proc (node: N; hnode: HNode): DotNode;
                   edgeDotRepr: proc (edge: E; hedge: HEdge): DotEdge = nil;
                   baseGraph: Option[DotGraph] = none(DotGraph);
                   clusters: seq[tuple[nodes: HNodeSet, name: string]] = @[]): DotGraph
proc dotRepr[N, E](graph: HGraph[N, E]): DotGraph
Convert graph to graphviz representation, using stringification for node and edge values.

Funcs

func newHEdgeMap[E](keepReverseIndex: bool = true): HEdgeMap[E]
func newHNodeMap[E](keepReverseIndex: bool = true): HNodeMap[E]
func initHNode(id: int): HNode {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func initHEdge(id: int): HEdge {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func newHGraph[N, E](properties: set[HGraphProperty] = {gpDirected,
    gpAllowSelfLoops}): HGraph[N, E]
func copyStructureHGraph[N, E](graph: HGraph[N, E]): HGraph[N, E]
func withMap[N1, N2, E](graph: HGraph[N1, E]; map: HNodeMap[N2]): HGraph[N2, E]
func withMap[N, E1, E2](graph: HGraph[N, E1]; map: HEdgeMap[E2]): HGraph[N, E2]
func incl(s: var HNodeSet; node: HNode) {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func incl(s: var HEdgeSet; edge: HEdge) {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func incl(s: var HNodeSet; node: HNodeSet) {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func incl(s: var HEdgeSet; edge: HEdgeSet) {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func excl(s: var HNodeSet; node: HNode) {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func excl(s: var HEdgeSet; edge: HEdge) {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}

func `+`(s1, s2: HEdgeSet): HEdgeSet {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func `*`(s1, s2: HEdgeSet): HEdgeSet {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func `<=`[S: HEdgeSet | HNodeSet](s1, s2: S): bool

func sourceVal[N, E](g: var HGraph[N, E]; edge: HEdge): var N
func contains[N](map: HNodeMap[N]; value: N): bool
func contains[N](map: HNodeMap[N]; node: HNode): bool

func getEdge[N, E](graph: HGraph[N, E]; source, target: HNode): HEdge

func len[E](map: HNodeMap[E]): int
func del[N](map: var HEdgeMap[N]; edge: HEdge)
func `[]`[N](map: HNodeMap[N]; value: N): HNode
Return fist node matching value value 
func `[]`[N, E](graph: HGraph[N, E]; value: N): HNode
Return fist node matching value value 
func `[]`[N](map: HNodeMap[N]; node: HNode): N

func nodeCount[N, E](graph: HGraph[N, E]): int
func inDeg[N, E](graph: HGraph[N, E]; node: HNode): int {...}{.inline.}
Return in degree for @arg{node} 
func outDeg[N, E](graph: HGraph[N, E]; node: HNode): int
Return out degree for @arg{node}. IMPLEMENT 
func isDirected[N, E](graph: HGraph[N, E]): bool {...}{.inline.}
func extendOutgoing[N, E](graph: HGraph[N, E]; nodes: HNodeSet;
                          accept: proc (node: HNode): bool = nil): HNodeSet

Iterators

iterator items(s: HEdgeSet): HEdge {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
iterator items(s: HNodeSet): HNode {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
iterator pairs[N](map: HNodeMap[N]): (HNode, N)
iterator pairs[N](map: HEdgeMap[N]): (HEdge, N)
iterator outEdges[N, E](graph: HGraph[N, E]; source: HNode): HEdge
Iterate over outgoing edges for source 
iterator inEdges[N, E](graph: HGraph[N, E]; target: HNode): HEdge
Iterate over ingoing edges for target 
iterator outNodes[N, E](graph: HGraph[N, E]; source: HNode): HNode
iterator inNodes[N, E](graph: HGraph[N, E]; source: HNode): HNode
iterator adjacent[N, E](graph: HGraph[N, E]; node: HNode): HNode
Iterate over all adjacent nodes for node 
iterator edges[N, E](graph: HGraph[N, E]): HEdge
Iterate over all edges in graph 
iterator nodes[N, E](graph: HGraph[N, E]): HNode
Iterate over all nodes in graph 
iterator nodesId[N, E](graph: HGraph[N, E]): int
iterator depthFirst[N, E](graph: HGraph[N, E]; root: HNode;
                          preorderYield: bool = true): HNode
Perform depth-first iteration of immutable nodes in graph, starting from node 
iterator depthFirst[N, E](graph: var HGraph[N, E]; root: HNode;
                          preorderYield: bool = true): HNode
Perform depth-first iteration of mutable nodes in graph, starting from node 
iterator breadthFirst[N, E](graph: HGraph[N, E]; root: HNode): HNode
Perform breadth-first iteration of parent graph, starting from node 
iterator breadthFirst[N, E](graph: var HGraph[N, E]; root: HNode): var HNode
Perform breadth-first iteration of parent graph, starting from node

Converters

converter toDotNodeId(id: HNodeId): DotNodeId {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
converter toDotNodeId(id: HNode): DotNodeId {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
converter toDotNodeId(id: seq[HNode | HNodeId]): seq[DotNodeId]

Made with Nim. Generated: 2021-06-30 09:27:51 UTC
